headline: Dollar Tree: Multi-Price Is Working, But Traffic Still Needs To Turn
summary: Dollar Tree's multi-price rollout has driven higher average ticket and positive comps, yet visits declined 1% in Q1 2026. See why DLTR stock is still a hold.
